overview: Spearheaded the complete migration of our legacy payment processing infrastructure to a modern, cloud-native architecture capable of handling 5x the previous transaction volume while achieving PCI-DSS Level 1 compliance.
challenges: Legacy monolithic architecture suffered from frequent timeouts during peak usage hours.
Zero-downtime requirement for migration due to global 24/7 transaction processing.
Strict regulatory and compliance requirements across 14 different countries.
solutions: Designed a microservices-based architecture using Node.js, Docker, and AWS ECS.
Implemented a dual-write database strategy during the transition phase to ensure data integrity without downtime.
Integrated automated security scanning and compliance checks into the CI/CD pipeline.
outcomes: Successfully increased transaction throughput by 500%, eliminating peak-hour timeouts.
Reduced infrastructure costs by 22% through auto-scaling and resource optimization.
Achieved zero downtime during the final DNS cutover.
